name: Caramelized Onions- Lora Brody
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Sweet Onions (remove stems, root ends, peel)
10 ounces Nonfat Vegetable Chicken Broth (low sodium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare onions: Peel and cut 2½–3 pound sweet onions (Vidalia or other varieties) into pieces about 2-3 inches in diameter.
2. In a crockpot, combine onions, butter, and broth. Cook on low for 12-24 hours until onions are deep golden brown and very soft. Different crockpots may require varying cooking times; avoid overcooking as it's nearly impossible to ruin them this way.
3. Use the caramelized onions and remaining liquid to flavor soups, stocks, stews, risotto, pasta sauces, or pizza toppings (drain liquid first for pizzas). The added butter enhances their rich, full flavor.
